title: Curriculum Developer Vacancy at NIIT Foundation - 2026 Batch

jsonLd.title: Curriculum Developer Vacancy at NIIT Foundation - 2026 Batch
jsonLd.description:
Join the NIIT Foundation family as a Curriculum Developer in Delhi. We believe in empowering our employees with the tools, training, and environment they need to succeed.

About NIIT Foundation:
NIIT Foundation is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Coordinate with academic counselors for student career guidance
• Design formative and summative assessments aligned to learning objectives
• Monitor student progress and provide timely feedback
• Maintain student records and prepare progress reports
• Participate in school events, workshops, and training programs
• Develop and deliver engaging lesson plans for students
• Conduct doubt-clearing sessions and remedial classes for weak students

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Bachelor's degree in a relevant field
• 10-15 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Educational Technology
• Proficiency in Curriculum Development
• Proficiency in MS Office
• Proficiency in Special Education
• Proficiency in CBSE/ICSE Standards
• Proficiency in LMS Platforms
• Proficiency in Content Creation
• Proficiency in Zoom/Teams

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Annual performance appraisal
• Life and accident insurance
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Salary Range: 20 LPA - 40 LPA per annum

Location: Delhi, Delhi, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with NIIT Foundation!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: Bachelor's degree in a relevant field
